message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "user" as User
participant "LicenseAcceptor" as LA
participant "FileAcceptance" as FA
participant "ArgAcceptance" as AA
participant "LicensePrompt" as LP
participant "HelpTextMixin" as HTM

User -> LA: /bin/chef
LA -> FA: ::check
FA --> LA: false
LA -> AA: ::check
AA --> LA: false
LA -> LP: ::request_acceptance
LP -> LP: ::check_for_tty
LP --> User: accept license?
User -> LP: yes
LP -> FA: ::persist
FA -> LP: path
LP --> LA: true

@enduml
```
